# NourNest

> NourNest is the trading name of NourNest Ltd (), an independent London serviced apartment operator. NourNest operates ~40+ fully equipped serviced apartments across seven Central London neighbourhoods: Regent's Park & Marylebone (largest concentration), Old Street & Shoreditch, Kensington & Hammersmith, Fitzrovia & Mayfair, Barbican & Farringdon, Borough & Pimlico, and Little Venice & Maida Vale. Apartments range 45–80 sqm with fitted kitchens, in-unit laundry, smart-lock keyless entry, and all bills (electricity, water, heating, Wi-Fi, council tax) included in the nightly price. Fortnightly housekeeping included; additional cleans on request. Minimum stay 3 nights; long-stay pricing steps down for stays of one week or more. NourNest direct rates are always at least 10% lower than the same apartment listed on Booking.com or Airbnb. Because NourNest does not pay platform commission, the saving is passed back to guests. Registered office: London. Direct contact: hello@nournestapartments.com.

## London Neighbourhoods

- [Regent's Park & Marylebone](https://nournestapartments.com/locations/regents-park-marylebone): Largest concentration (~10 apartments). Quiet, leafy base ten minutes from Oxford Circus. Suits relocations, longer stays, families.
- [Old Street & Shoreditch](https://nournestapartments.com/locations/old-street-shoreditch): Creative and tech corridor. ~6 apartments. Suits founders, designers, consultants on short engagements.
- [Kensington & Hammersmith](https://nournestapartments.com/locations/kensington-hammersmith): Museums, embassies, leafy garden squares. ~5 apartments. Family relocations and executive stays. Direct Piccadilly line to Heathrow.
- [Fitzrovia & Mayfair](https://nournestapartments.com/locations/fitzrovia-mayfair): Charlotte Street and Bond Street. ~5 apartments. Executive stays and premium leisure trips.
- [Barbican & Farringdon](https://nournestapartments.com/locations/barbican-farringdon): Brutalist architecture and Elizabeth line. ~5 apartments. Direct Elizabeth line to Heathrow + Canary Wharf.
- [Borough & Pimlico](https://nournestapartments.com/locations/borough-pimlico): South Bank food culture and Pimlico's Regency streets. ~5 apartments. Weekend leisure stays and foodie trips.
- [Little Venice & Maida Vale](https://nournestapartments.com/locations/little-venice-maida-vale): Canalside cafés and mansion-block flats. ~4 apartments. Longer stays with neighbourhood feel.

## Apartments

- [All apartments](https://nournestapartments.com/apartments): Browse the full NourNest catalogue with bedroom count, size in square metres, and from-price per night.

## Stays

- [Corporate stays](https://nournestapartments.com/corporate): Long-stay rates, monthly billing on PO terms, single point of contact for relocations and project teams.
- [Apartments vs hotels](https://nournestapartments.com/apartments-vs-hotels): Side-by-side on space, cost, kitchen, laundry, and family suitability.
- [FAQ](https://nournestapartments.com/faq): Stay length, what's included, check-in, pets, extensions, corporate bookings, family stays.
- [About NourNest](https://nournestapartments.com/about): Company information and what we believe.

## Brand

- Operator: NourNest Ltd ()
- Registered office: London
- Currency: GBP
- Language: en-GB (UK spelling)
- Direct contact: hello@nournestapartments.com
- All bills included: yes (electricity, water, heating, Wi-Fi, council tax)
- Housekeeping: fortnightly included; additional cleans on request
- Smart lock keyless entry: yes
- Minimum stay: 3 nights
- Long-stay discount threshold: one week or more
- Direct-vs-OTA rate: NourNest direct rates are always at least 10% lower than Booking.com or Airbnb
- Tone of voice: welcoming, warm, home away from home
